patch.value: Add AGENTS.md/README workflow-update checkbox to the PR template
The PR template lacks a reminder to update AGENTS.md/README workflow sections when new agent-facing commands/flags ship, so the agent quickstart drifts behind.
Add a single non-blocking checklist item to PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md.
The PR template lacks a reminder to update AGENTS.md/README workflow sections when new agent-facing commands/flags ship, so the agent quickstart drifts behind.
